title: isotrema heterophyllum
intro: Isotrema heterophyllum, also known as the Himalayan snakeroot, is a medicinal plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and anti-spasmodic properties, which have been found to aid in the relief of various health issues, such as rheumatism, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of alkaloids, including isotrema and heteropodin, which are believed to possess anti-microbial and anti-cancer properties. Isotrema heterophyllum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
